text: ⚡ 🇮🇱 Red alert sirens are sounding in Acre, and the surrounding areas of the Upper Galilee region, Northern Israel. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡ 🇮🇱 以色列北部上加利利地区及阿卡周边地区响起红色警报。 @wfwitness

text: بيان صادر عن حزب الله حول العدوان الصهيوني على السراي الحكومي في مدينة النبطية: ارتكب العدو الصهيوني اليوم مجزرة كبرى استكمالًا لمجزرته في يوم الأربعاء الأسود، مستهدفًا السراي الحكومي في مدينة النبطية، ما أدى إلى استشهاد ١٣ عنصرًا من جهاز أمن الدولة، في اعتداء سافر وخطير طاول مؤسسة أمنية رسمية سيادية، مما يؤكد أن هذا العدو يمعن في استباحة كل لبنان دولة وشعبًا ومؤسسات، في محاولة لإيقاع أكبر عدد من الخسائر والدمار ليكسر إرادة الشعب الصامد، وليغطي على فشله الكبير في الميدان. إن هذا العدوان الإجرامي يضع الدولة اللبنانية أمام مسؤوليات جسيمة لا يمكن التنصل منها. ففي الوقت التي تهرع فيه إلى استجداء المفاوضات المباشرة مع العدو تحت النار، مفرّطة بأوراق القوة وما سطره المجاهدون من إنجازات في الميدان، وتحت ذرائع السيادة الشكلية، تُترك السيادة الحقيقية نهبًا لصواريخ العدو وطائراته وجرائمه. وإزاء كل التنازلات التي قُدّمت وتُقدم للعدو رغم ما ارتكبه من مجازر وقتل ودمار من دون أي ضمانات مقابلة، والعمل ليل نهار وفي ظل العدوان على محاولة سحب الشرعية من المقاومة الدفاعية التي هي حق يكفلها الدستور والقانون الدولي، يوجّه العدو رسالته بالدم بأن كل شيء مباح أمام عدوانه، وأن كل تنازل يقابله مزيد من الاستباحة والدمار. وإننا إذ ندين هذه المجزرة الوحشية، نتقدم بأحر التعازي من عائلات الشهداء ومن جهاز أمن الدولة قيادة وضباطًا وعناصر، وندعو السلطة إلى أن تعي خطورة مسار التنازلات مع عدو لا يفقه إلا القوة، وأن تعود إلى موقعها الطبيعي إلى جانب شعبها ومقاومته. فبالوحدة الوطنية والصمود والثبات نتغلب على هذا العدوان، ويخرج لبنان كله منتصرًا بإذن الله. #الإعلام_الحربي
text_zh: 黎巴嫩真主党就犹太复国主义者对纳巴泰市（Nabatieh）政府大楼的侵略发表声明：犹太复国主义敌人今天犯下了滔天罪行，这是继“黑色星期三”大屠杀后的又一暴行。他们袭击了纳巴泰市的政府大楼，导致13名国家安全部门人员殉难。这是一次针对主权国家安全机构的公然且危险的侵略，再次证明该敌人正肆意践踏黎巴嫩的国家、人民和机构，试图通过制造最大规模的伤亡和破坏来摧毁人民的抵抗意志，并掩盖其在战场上的惨败。这一犯罪行径将黎巴嫩政府置于无法推卸的重大责任面前。在政府急于在炮火下乞求与敌人直接谈判，放弃手中的筹码和圣战者在战场上取得的成就，并以形式上的主权为借口时，真正的国家主权却沦为敌人导弹、战机和罪行的牺牲品。面对敌人犯下的屠杀、杀戮和破坏，在没有任何对等保证的情况下，政府做出了一系列让步，并日夜在侵略阴影下试图剥夺防御性抵抗运动的合法性（这是宪法和国际法赋予的权利），敌人用鲜血传达了一个信息：在他们的侵略面前，一切皆可被践踏，任何让步只会换来更多的蹂躏和破坏。我们谴责这一野蛮屠杀，向烈士家属以及国家安全部门的领导、军官和成员表示最深切的哀悼。我们呼吁当局认清与一个只懂武力的敌人进行让步的危险性，并回到与人民及其抵抗运动站在一起的立场。通过民族团结、坚韧和坚定，我们将战胜这场侵略，黎巴嫩必将取得胜利，愿真主保佑。 #战争媒体

text: 🇮🇱 ⚡️ Israeli media: The Lebanese arena is imposing a continuous cost on us, and the longer the fighting continues, the more we will continue to pay the price, whether in the north or inside Lebanon.
text_zh: 🇮🇱 ⚡️ 以色列媒体：黎巴嫩战场正让我们付出持续的代价，战斗持续的时间越长，我们付出的代价就越大，无论是在北部还是在黎巴嫩境内。

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇯🇴 Kan: The Israeli military intercepted a drone in the Dead Sea area. Initial examination indicates it was a civilian drone, not a UAV, that came from a nearby country – probably from Jordan, not Yemen. The incident occurred during a smuggling attempt from Jordan. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇯🇴 Kan：以色列军方在死海地区拦截了一架无人机。初步检查显示，这是一架来自邻国的民用无人机，而非军用无人机——很可能来自约旦，而非也门。该事件发生在一次从约旦进行的走私尝试期间。 @wfwitness

text: Middle East Expert Adam Weinstein (Quincy Institute) I don’t think Trump is going to get the deal he wants because he has lost his biggest leverage - the threat of military force. He threw everything at them, but the regime survived. FULL INTERVIEW
text_zh: 中东专家亚当·温斯坦（昆西研究所）：我不认为特朗普能达成他想要的协议，因为他已经失去了最大的筹码——军事威胁。他向他们施加了所有压力，但政权依然存活。完整采访

text: Death to Israel Death to Judaism These are barely some of the folds more victims. Look at their faces
text_zh: 以色列去死，犹太教去死。这些只是更多受害者中的一小部分。看看他们的脸

text: ↩️ Reply to קבינט מדיני ביטחוני - מוריה אסרף & דורון קדוש: "צה״ל חושף את הערכת ההישג של אמ״ן על התקיפה הנרחבת שלשום בכ-100 מפקדות חזבאללה בו זמנית: כ-180 מחבלי חזבאללה חוסלו בתקיפות ברחבי לבנון. מדובר במספר לא סופי, ובאגף המודיעין ממשיכים לברר את היקף הרוגי חזבאללה בתקיפה. לפי משרד הבריאות הלבנוני, 300 איש נהרגו בגל התקיפות הזה של צה״ל. המשמעות היא, שלפחות 60% מתוך ההרוגים - הם מחבלי חזבאללה - מדובר ביחס בין מחבלים לבלתי מעורבים שנחשב טוב." The death toll in Lebanon is 354 and there are about 1,250 injuries including critical/coma/amputees This toll is so bloody there are many civilians still missing. No Israel didn't kill 180 Hezbullah. They killed Shia of which some happen to have been members of Hezbullah and Amal. Everywhere you kill a Shia you will kill either an Amal or a Hezbullah member. This is our community. Every single family will have a member of Hezbullah, Amal, Lebanese Army and Police at the same time. What you did was an indiscriminate bombing of Civilian buildings killing families not men. Killing children and women and elderly You are spawns from the depths of hell. I wish the Holocaust was real You deserve a 100 holocaust you sons of whores
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 政治安全内阁 - 莫里亚·阿萨夫 & 多伦·卡多什：“以色列国防军披露了军事情报局对前天同时袭击约100个真主党指挥部的评估结果：约180名真主党武装分子在黎巴嫩各地的袭击中被消灭。这不是最终数字，情报部门仍在核实真主党在袭击中的死亡人数。据黎巴嫩卫生部称，以色列国防军的这波袭击造成300人死亡。这意味着，死者中至少有60%是真主党武装分子——这个武装分子与平民的比例被认为是很好的。” 黎巴嫩的死亡人数为354人，约有1,250人受伤，包括重伤、昏迷和截肢者。这个伤亡数字太惨烈了，还有许多平民失踪。不，以色列没有杀死180名真主党成员。他们杀害的是什叶派民众，其中一些人恰好是真主党和阿迈勒运动的成员。在任何地方，只要你杀害什叶派，你就会杀死阿迈勒或真主党的成员。这就是我们的社区。每个家庭都同时有成员在真主党、阿迈勒、黎巴嫩军队和警察中。你们所做的是对平民建筑的无差别轰炸，杀害的是家庭，而不是男人。杀害儿童、妇女和老人。你们是来自地狱深处的恶魔。我真希望大屠杀是真的，你们这些婊子养的，你们活该遭受100次大屠杀

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 The Israeli military has revealed details of its largest strike in Lebanon since the start of Operation Roaring Lion. Within a single minute, the IDF killed 180 alleged Hezbollah members across three areas simultaneously: Beirut, the Bekaa and southern Lebanon. The strike hit approximately 100 targets, including alleged command centres, military structures, an emergency intelligence headquarters, Radwan Force and missile unit command centres, and weapons storage facilities. Most of the infrastructure, per the IDF, was located in the heart of civilian areas, which the IDF described as "Hezbollah’s cynical use of Lebanese civilians as human shields." @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 以色列军方披露了自“咆哮狮子”行动开始以来在黎巴嫩进行的最大规模打击的细节。在一分钟内，以色列国防军在贝鲁特、贝卡和黎巴嫩南部三个地区同时消灭了180名所谓的真主党成员。袭击击中了约100个目标，包括所谓的指挥中心、军事设施、紧急情报总部、拉德万部队和导弹部队指挥中心以及武器储存设施。据以色列国防军称，大部分基础设施位于平民区中心，以色列国防军将其描述为“真主党冷酷地利用黎巴嫩平民作为人体盾牌”。 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇱🇱🇧 Impact of a projectile in Kiryat Shmona, northern Israel, from Hezbollah that hadn't triggered alerts. No injuries have been reported. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 Footage showing the impact in Kiryat Shmona, northern Israel from the Hezbollah projectile that didn't activate alerts. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇱🇱🇧 真主党的一枚炮弹击中以色列北部基里亚特什莫纳，未触发警报。目前没有人员伤亡报告。 @wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 视频显示了真主党炮弹击中以色列北部基里亚特什莫纳的画面，该炮弹未触发警报。 @wfwitness

text: The Lebanese ambassador to the U.S will call the Israeli ambassador in the U.S in the first public normalization act between both countries at the orders of the Lebanese President Aoun (Christian) and the Lebanese Prime Minister (Sunni) Lebanon is falling into a dark age
text_zh: 黎巴嫩驻美大使将致电以色列驻美大使，这是在黎巴嫩总统奥恩（基督教徒）和黎巴嫩总理（逊尼派）的命令下，两国之间首次公开的正常化行为。黎巴嫩正在陷入黑暗时代

text: ↩️ Reply to קבינט מדיני ביטחוני - מוריה אסרף & דורון קדוש: "המשמעות היא, שלפחות 60% מתוך ההרוגים - הם מחבלי חזבאללה - מדובר ביחס בין מחבלים לבלתי מעורבים שנחשב טוב." The Holocaust ratio was good too. Let's do it again please
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 政治安全内阁 - 莫里亚·阿萨夫 & 多伦·卡多什：“这意味着，死者中至少有60%是真主党武装分子——这个武装分子与平民的比例被认为是很好的。” 大屠杀的比例也很好。请再来一次吧

text: Open Source Intel Adam Weinstein, Middle East expert (Quincy Institute): "The reason Iranians are negotiating is because they've sustained a lot of damage. They want to monetize the Strait of Hormuz and be able to sell their oil. They trust the leverage they have over Hormuz, not the Americans." https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2042658379626066034/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 中东专家亚当·温斯坦（昆西研究所）：“伊朗人之所以进行谈判，是因为他们遭受了巨大损失。他们想从霍尔木兹海峡获利并能够出售石油。他们相信自己对霍尔木兹海峡的控制力，而不是美国人。” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2042658379626066034/video/1 推文

text: ↩️ Reply to Middle East Spectator — MES: "—❗️🇮🇷/🇱🇧/🇮🇱 NEW: ‘Lebanon and Israel both prefer a ceasefire to be the result of a ‘gesture of goodwill’ from the Israeli side, and not to be portrayed as a result of Iranian pressure’ – Axios" You mean Israel and the Israeli puppets in Lebanon called the President and the PM
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 中东观察家 — MES：“—❗️🇮🇷/🇱🇧/🇮🇱 最新消息：‘黎巴嫩和以色列都倾向于将停火视为以色列方面的“善意姿态”的结果，而不是被描绘成伊朗施压的结果’ – Axios” 你是指黎巴嫩的以色列傀儡总统和总理

text: Open Source Intel Ukrainian kamikaze drones hit two Russian drilling platforms in the Caspian Sea, over 1,000 km from the front line. Air defenses on the platforms failed to intercept. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2042657415468916842/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 乌克兰神风特攻队无人机袭击了里海的两个俄罗斯钻井平台，距离前线超过1,000公里。平台上的防空系统未能拦截。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2042657415468916842/video/1 推文

text: Visioner 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 🛫 2x Iran's Meraj Airlines planes, 1x Airbus A321-231 (IRAN04) and 1x Airbus A320-212, are now enroute to Pakistan They were spotted over the skies of the Islamic Emirate of Afghanistan It seems that indeed the Islamic Republic is sending a delegation to speak with the United States in Pakistan tweet
text_zh: Visioner 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 🛫 2架伊朗Meraj航空公司的飞机，1架空客A321-231（IRAN04）和1架空客A320-212，目前正在前往巴基斯坦的途中。它们被发现在阿富汗伊斯兰酋长国的上空。看来伊朗伊斯兰共和国确实正在派遣代表团在巴基斯坦与美国进行会谈。推文

text: Open Source Intel Kamala Harris: He said he got rid of their nuclear arsenal, obliterated it, he said. You know how he likes to use those kinds of words, “obliterated it,” which is not an ambiguous term. That means you took it out. Well, evidently, he did not do that. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2042656573235818899/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 卡玛拉·哈里斯：他说他摆脱了他们的核武库，彻底摧毁了它，他是这么说的。你知道他喜欢用那种词，“彻底摧毁”，这不是一个模棱两可的词。这意味着你把它消除了。好吧，显然，他并没有那样做。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2042656573235818899/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Kamala Harris: It is not just about the individual, it is about the apparatus, if you will -- I would refer to talk about the cronies who are allowing this to happen. Members of Congress. I'm going to use the F word, who are feckless. It is an appropriate F word https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2042656119860912491/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 卡玛拉·哈里斯：这不仅仅是关于个人，而是关于整个机构，如果你愿意的话——我会提到那些允许这种情况发生的亲信。国会议员。我要用那个F开头的词，他们是无能的。这是一个恰当的F词 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2042656119860912491/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Kamala Harris on running again in 2028: I might. I’m thinking about it. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2042655524932440076/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 卡玛拉·哈里斯谈到2028年再次参选：我可能会。我正在考虑。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2042655524932440076/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Zohran Mamdani on Iran War: At the heart of any war is dehumanization. And dehumanization never stays confined to the war. When you normalize killing abroad, you normalize cruelty at home. This is the dehumanization we are allowing to spread in our country. A young Muslim woman was attacked on a subway platform. Her attacker said, ‘I wonder how many Iranians we killed today.’ tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 佐兰·曼达尼谈伊朗战争：任何战争的核心都是非人化。而非人化永远不会局限于战争。当你使国外的杀戮正常化时，你就使国内的残忍正常化了。这就是我们允许在我国蔓延的非人化。一名年轻的穆斯林女性在地铁站台上遭到袭击。袭击者说：“我想知道我们今天杀了多少伊朗人。” 推文

text: ↩️ Reply to OSINT Visioner 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 🇺🇲 BREAKING | Today in Pakistan, the planned talks between Iran and the US were postponed for one day because the Iranian side states that they will not participate in the negotiations until Israel stops airstrikes on Hezbollah positions in Lebanon. Furthermore, the Speaker of the Iranian Parliament declares that alongside a ceasefire in Lebanon, a precondition for the talks is the unfreezing of Iranian assets. Meanwhile, according to Israel's Channel 12, Donald Trump is pressuring Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu to stop attacks in Lebanon because they hinder negotiations with Iran. According to Lebanese media, it is expected that before the talks scheduled in Pakistan tomorrow – formally initiated as so-called peace talks – Israel and Lebanon will announce a kind of ceasefire agreement, which is seen as a goodwill gesture before the start of Iran-US negotiations. In parallel, apparently angered by Iran's conditions, Trump writes that Iran is better at public relations and fake news than fighting, and also notes that the Iranians have no cards except the Strait of Hormuz, naming the planned talks as the only reason they are still alive. See the latest updates with us: @visionergeo tweet
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 OSINT Visioner 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 🇺🇲 突发 | 今天在巴基斯坦，原定于伊朗和美国之间的会谈被推迟了一天，因为伊朗方面表示，在以色列停止对黎巴嫩真主党阵地的空袭之前，他们不会参加谈判。此外，伊朗议会议长宣布，除了黎巴嫩停火外，会谈的前提条件是解冻伊朗资产。与此同时，据以色列第12频道报道，唐纳德·特朗普正在向以色列总理本雅明·内塔尼亚胡施压，要求停止在黎巴嫩的袭击，因为这些袭击阻碍了与伊朗的谈判。据黎巴嫩媒体报道，预计在明天预定于巴基斯坦举行的会谈之前——正式启动所谓的和平谈判——以色列和黎巴嫩将宣布某种停火协议，这被视为伊朗与美国谈判开始前的善意姿态。与此同时，特朗普显然对伊朗的条件感到愤怒，写道伊朗在公关和假新闻方面比在战斗方面更擅长，并指出伊朗除了霍尔木兹海峡外没有任何筹码，称计划中的会谈是他们仍然存活的唯一原因。与我们一起查看最新更新：@visionergeo 推文

text: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : 🇺🇦 Presidential commissioner for sanctions Vladyslav Vlasyuk said that Iranian drones used in attacks in the Middle East may contain both Russian and American components. ❗️ A new analysis of Shahed drones examined by the SBU in western Ukraine found no components from the Dutch company NXP. 📌 Vlasyuk expressed cautious optimism that Russia may have stopped receiving components from the Netherlands, calling it a positive outcome of joint efforts. See the latest updates with us: @NSTRIKE1231 tweet
text_zh: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : 🇺🇦 总统制裁专员弗拉迪斯拉夫·弗拉修克表示，在中东袭击中使用的伊朗无人机可能包含俄罗斯和美国的零部件。❗️ 乌克兰国家安全局（SBU）在乌克兰西部检查的Shahed无人机的新分析发现，没有来自荷兰公司NXP的零部件。📌 弗拉修克表示谨慎乐观，认为俄罗斯可能已经停止接收来自荷兰的零部件，称这是共同努力的积极成果。与我们一起查看最新更新：@NSTRIKE1231 推文

text: Turkish President Erdogan: Isn’t introducing the death penalty only for Palestinian prisoners essentially apartheid? Isn’t it using the law as a tool of racist authoritarianism? Is there, in essence, any real difference between Hitler’s monstrous policies against Jews and the decision taken by the Israeli parliament with such a sense of triumph? Aren’t all these actions just another manifestation of denial, destruction, oppression, and political repression directed at the Palestinian people? Undoubtedly, these actions amount to discrimination and racism. It would mean implementing a system even worse than the apartheid regime that was dismantled in South Africa in 1994.
text_zh: 土耳其总统埃尔多安：仅对巴勒斯坦囚犯实行死刑，这本质上不是种族隔离吗？这不是将法律作为种族主义威权主义的工具吗？本质上，希特勒针对犹太人的残暴政策与以色列议会以这种胜利感做出的决定之间，有什么真正的区别吗？所有这些行动难道不是针对巴勒斯坦人民的否认、破坏、压迫和政治镇压的又一种表现吗？毫无疑问，这些行动等同于歧视和种族主义。这意味着实施一个比1994年在南非废除的种族隔离制度更糟糕的系统。

text: Professor John Mearsheimer: Israel may ultimately use nuclear weapons against Iran. It is now clear that Israel cannot prevent Iran from acquiring nuclear weapons using its conventional forces. That option does not work. The only option they have left is nuclear weapons. The United States will not stop it.
text_zh: 约翰·米尔斯海默教授：以色列最终可能会对伊朗使用核武器。现在很清楚，以色列无法利用其常规力量阻止伊朗获得核武器。那个选择行不通。他们剩下的唯一选择就是核武器。美国不会阻止它。

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 Ynet: Israeli forces have encircled the town of Bint Jbeil in southern Lebanon for the third consecutive day, with dozens of alleged Hezbollah fighters trapped inside. The IDF has issued several evacuation warnings and considers anyone remaining a combatant. Some fighters attempted to flee as troops closed in and were killed. Pressure has shifted away from Beirut, with the main fighting now focused around Bint Jbeil. Israel assesses that Hezbollah’s increased rocket fire is a response to the encirclement. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 Ynet：以色列军队已连续第三天包围黎巴嫩南部的宾特朱拜勒（Bint Jbeil）镇，数十名所谓的真主党武装人员被困在里面。以色列国防军已发出多次撤离警告，并将任何留下的人视为战斗人员。一些武装人员在军队逼近时试图逃跑并被击毙。压力已从贝鲁特转移，主要战斗现在集中在宾特朱拜勒周围。以色列评估认为，真主党火箭弹袭击的增加是对包围的回应。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Hezbollah has announced that they “targeted the Shraga Base” (the administrative headquarters of the Golani Brigade command) north of the city of Acre with a rocket barrage and a swarm of kamikaze drones. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 真主党宣布，他们用火箭弹和一群神风特攻队无人机“瞄准了什拉加基地”（戈兰尼旅指挥部的行政总部），该基地位于阿卡市以北。 @wfwitness

text: Turkish President Erdogan: On the day the ceasefire was declared, Israel brutally killed 254 Lebanese people. The genocidal network, blinded by blood and hatred, continues to kill innocent children, women, and civilians, disregarding all human values and recognizing no rules or principles.
text_zh: 土耳其总统埃尔多安：在宣布停火的那天，以色列残忍地杀害了254名黎巴嫩人。这个被鲜血和仇恨蒙蔽的种族灭绝网络，无视所有人类价值观，不承认任何规则或原则，继续杀害无辜的儿童、妇女和平民。

text: — ❗️ 🇺🇸 / 🇮🇷 / 🇵🇰 BREAKING: Two Iranian planes are now on their way to Islamabad, Pakistan Very likely the Iranian delegation. Unclear of the exact composition of said delegation. @Middle_East_Spectator
text_zh: — ❗️ 🇺🇸 / 🇮🇷 / 🇵🇰 突发：两架伊朗飞机目前正在前往巴基斯坦伊斯兰堡的途中，很可能是伊朗代表团。该代表团的具体组成尚不清楚。 @Middle_East_Spectator

text: Professor John Mearsheimer on Iran: Trump is desperate. We are playing a losing hand. This would destroy far more than a presidency. He knows this. He threatened extermination — because escalation failed. By evening, he backs off. He basically says: I concede defeat.
text_zh: 约翰·米尔斯海默教授谈伊朗：特朗普绝望了。我们正在打出一手烂牌。这摧毁的不仅仅是一个总统任期。他知道这一点。他威胁要灭绝——因为升级失败了。到了晚上，他退缩了。他基本上说：我承认失败。

text: 🇮🇷 ✈️ 🇵🇰 Two Iranian Meraj Airlines passenger planes are en route to Pakistan, likely carrying the Iranian negotiating team, though it’s unclear who is on board. Meanwhile, Israeli media reports that a ceasefire announcement in Lebanon is expected. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ✈️ 🇵🇰 两架伊朗Meraj航空公司的客机正在前往巴基斯坦的途中，很可能载有伊朗谈判小组，尽管尚不清楚机上人员是谁。与此同时，以色列媒体报道称，预计黎巴嫩将宣布停火。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Professor John Mearsheimer on Iran: There is no attractive exit option for Trump. The only way out is to admit defeat.
text_zh: 约翰·米尔斯海默教授谈伊朗：对于特朗普来说，没有吸引人的退出选择。唯一的出路是承认失败。

text: Professor John Mearsheimer: Iran holds almost all the cards. They are in a very powerful position. By closing Hormuz, they can tank the global economy. The leverage is enormous. They can destroy GCC countries as functioning societies. They can wreck those countries. Trump can’t climb the escalation ladder. On every rung, Iran can beat him.
text_zh: 约翰·米尔斯海默教授：伊朗掌握了几乎所有的牌。他们处于一个非常强大的位置。通过关闭霍尔木兹海峡，他们可以摧毁全球经济。筹码是巨大的。他们可以摧毁海湾合作委员会国家作为正常运作的社会。他们可以摧毁那些国家。特朗普无法在升级阶梯上攀升。在每一个层级上，伊朗都能击败他。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡🇮🇱 Red alert sirens are sounding in Nahariya, and the surrounding areas of the Confrontation Line region, Northern Israel. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 Impact of a projectile in Kiryat Shmona, northern Israel, from Hezbollah that hadn't triggered alerts. No injuries have been reported. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡🇮🇱 以色列北部纳哈里亚及对抗线周边地区响起红色警报。 @wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 真主党的一枚炮弹击中以色列北部基里亚特什莫纳，未触发警报。目前没有人员伤亡报告。 @wfwitness

text: 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 ⚡️ 🇱🇧 KAN News: Netanyahu Changes Strike Policy in Lebanon – Personal Approval Needed for Any Operation in Beirut
text_zh: 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 ⚡️ 🇱🇧 KAN新闻：内塔尼亚胡改变了在黎巴嫩的打击政策——在贝鲁特的任何行动都需要个人批准

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇺🇸 Kan : Following a request from U.S. President Trump, Israeli Prime Minister Netanyahu has changed Israel’s strike policy in Lebanon. Each strike in Beirut now requires a different approval process and is subject to the prime minister’s personal authorisation. An Israeli source said there is no ceasefire, but there has been a “very significant reduction” in strikes. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇺🇸 Kan：应美国总统特朗普的要求，以色列总理内塔尼亚胡改变了以色列在黎巴嫩的打击政策。现在，贝鲁特的每一次打击都需要不同的审批程序，并须经总理个人授权。一位以色列消息人士称，目前没有停火，但打击次数有了“非常显著的减少”。 @wfwitness

text: 🚢 Six weeks into the war, the Strait of Hormuz remains effectively closed. Bloomberg vessel tracking data shows traffic collapsed from ~50 ships per day to near zero on February 28, and has barely recovered despite the ceasefire announcement. Most recent crossings are limited to Iran-linked vessels. Normal daily traffic: ~135 ships. Current: near zero. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🚢 战争六周后，霍尔木兹海峡实际上仍然处于关闭状态。彭博社的船舶跟踪数据显示，交通量从每天约50艘船崩溃到2月28日接近零，尽管宣布了停火，但几乎没有恢复。最近的过境仅限于与伊朗有关的船只。正常的日常交通量：约135艘船。当前：接近零。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇷🇺🇸🇮🇱 Iran’s National Oil Refining and Distribution Company announced that the Lavan Island oil refinery facilities were attacked around 10am on Wednesday. Firefighting and safety teams are working to control the blaze. No casualties have been reported…" ⚡ 🇮🇷 A fire is still ongoing at the Lavan refinery in Iran. Satellite imagery taken today confirms the destruction of 2-4 fuel tanks. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇷🇺🇸🇱🇧 伊朗国家炼油和分销公司宣布，拉万岛炼油厂设施于周三上午10点左右遭到袭击。消防和安全小组正在努力控制火势。目前没有人员伤亡报告……” ⚡ 🇮🇷 伊朗拉万炼油厂的火灾仍在持续。今天拍摄的卫星图像证实了2-4个燃料罐被摧毁。 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇱🇧🇮🇱🇺🇸 Al-Arabi Al-Jadeed: Lebanon will request a ceasefire during talks with the Israeli ambassador in Washington Yechiel Leiter this evening, as a goodwill gesture to begin negotiations. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Diplomatic sources to Al-Jadeed on a ceasefire: No final ceasefire, but a de-escalation in Beirut while the Israeli military situation in southern Lebanon remains unchanged @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇱🇧🇮🇱🇺🇸 Al-Arabi Al-Jadeed：黎巴嫩将在今晚与以色列驻华盛顿大使耶希尔·莱特（Yechiel Leiter）的会谈中请求停火，作为开始谈判的善意姿态。 @wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 外交消息人士向Al-Jadeed透露关于停火的消息：没有最终停火，但贝鲁特局势有所缓和，而以色列在黎巴嫩南部的军事状况保持不变 @wfwitness

text: Zohran Mamdani on Iran War: At the heart of any war is dehumanization. And dehumanization never stays confined to the war. When you normalize killing abroad, you normalize cruelty at home. This is the dehumanization we are allowing to spread in our country. A young Muslim woman was attacked on a subway platform. Her attacker said, ‘I wonder how many Iranians we killed today.’
text_zh: 佐兰·曼达尼谈伊朗战争：任何战争的核心都是非人化。而非人化永远不会局限于战争。当你使国外的杀戮正常化时，你就使国内的残忍正常化了。这就是我们允许在我国蔓延的非人化。一名年轻的穆斯林女性在地铁站台上遭到袭击。袭击者说：“我想知道我们今天杀了多少伊朗人。”

text: Zohran Mamdani on Iran War: We are speaking about a war that has killed thousands of civilians. We are spending tens of billions of dollars to kill people. Money that could be making life easier for working people. The things we’re told are unrealistic would cost a fraction of this war. We always seem to have money for war, but not to feed the poor.
text_zh: 佐兰·曼达尼谈伊朗战争：我们谈论的是一场已经杀害了数千名平民的战争。我们正在花费数百亿美元去杀人。这些钱本可以改善劳动人民的生活。我们被告知不现实的事情，其成本只是这场战争的一小部分。我们似乎总是有钱打仗，却没钱救济穷人。

text: ⚡ 🇮🇱 Red alert sirens are sounding in Nahariya, and the surrounding areas of the Confrontation Line region, Northern Israel. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡ 🇮🇱 以色列北部纳哈里亚及对抗线周边地区响起红色警报。 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇱🇺🇸🇱🇧 Israeli Channel 12: U.S. President Donald Trump is pushing Israel to implement a ceasefire deal between Lebanon and Israel by Tuesday. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 Al-Arabi Al-Jadeed: Lebanon will request a ceasefire during talks with the Israeli ambassador in Washington Yechiel Leiter this evening, as a goodwill gesture to begin negotiations. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇱🇺🇸🇱🇧 以色列第12频道：美国总统唐纳德·特朗普正在推动以色列在周二之前实施黎巴嫩和以色列之间的停火协议。 @wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 Al-Arabi Al-Jadeed：黎巴嫩将在今晚与以色列驻华盛顿大使耶希尔·莱特（Yechiel Leiter）的会谈中请求停火，作为开始谈判的善意姿态。 @wfwitness

text: 🇺🇸 ⚡️ 🇮🇷 U.S. Plans to Seek Freedom for At Least Six American Prisoners Held in Iran as Part of Broader Negotiations
text_zh: 🇺🇸 ⚡️ 🇮🇷 美国计划在更广泛的谈判中寻求释放至少六名被伊朗扣押的美国囚犯

text: WarTranslated A Russian drone hit an apartment building in Sumy, injuring a woman, acting mayor Artem Kobzar said. https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2042650418824482917/video/1 tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated 代理市长阿尔乔姆·科布扎尔（Artem Kobzar）表示，一架俄罗斯无人机击中了苏梅的一栋公寓楼，造成一名妇女受伤。 https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2042650418824482917/video/1 推文

text: Faytuks News RT @FaytuksNetwork : Our amazing Faytuks Network editorial member has launched his own Twitter. The GOAT of all GOATs, go give him a follow: @NatSec_News tweet
text_zh: Faytuks News RT @FaytuksNetwork : 我们出色的Faytuks Network编辑成员已经推出了他自己的Twitter。所有GOAT中的GOAT，去关注他：@NatSec_News 推文

text: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : ❗️ ❗️ ❗️ 🇺🇸 Donald Trump signaled that peace talks with Iran may collapse, following his latest remarks: 📌 “Iranians are far better at handling fake news and public relations than they are at fighting.” 📌 “It seems they don’t realize they hold no real leverage, aside from short-term blackmail of the world through international shipping routes. The only reason they are still in this position is because negotiations are ongoing.” See the latest updates with us: @NSTRIKE1231 tweet
text_zh: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : ❗️ ❗️ ❗️ 🇺🇸 唐纳德·特朗普在最新的言论后暗示，与伊朗的和平谈判可能会破裂：📌 “伊朗人在处理假新闻和公关方面远比在战斗方面更擅长。” 📌 “看来他们没有意识到，除了通过国际航运路线对世界进行短期勒索外，他们没有任何真正的筹码。他们之所以仍处于这个位置，唯一的原因是谈判正在进行中。” 与我们一起查看最新更新：@NSTRIKE1231 推文

text: Visioner 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 "The Iranians are better at handling the Fake News Media, and “Public Relations,” than they are at fighting! President DONALD J. TRUMP" - President Trump tweet
text_zh: Visioner 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 “伊朗人在处理假新闻媒体和‘公共关系’方面比在战斗方面更擅长！唐纳德·J·特朗普总统” - 特朗普总统 推文
